exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-03-24 60kg × 9 reps — maintain weight, focus on controlled ROM and mind-muscle connection. No elbow flaring.

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-20 5kg × 10 reps — hold weight, increase reps to 12–15 for shoulder balance and rotator cuff rehab on push day.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Underhand Tricep Extension
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-20 7.5kg × 10 reps — maintain weight, shoulder-safe underhand grip avoids impingement.

exercises.name: Cable Shoulder Internal Rotation
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-20 5kg × 10 reps — rotator cuff rehab accessory, light weight, high reps. Perform as final warm-down set.

notes: Week 1 MEV: chest 8 sets (3+3 from bench and rear delt fly secondary), triceps 6 sets (3+3 from underhand tricep + internal rotation secondary). Shoulder rehab warm-up: band external rotations 2×15/arm, band pull-aparts 2×15 before session. Tempo 3-1-2 (eccentric-pause-concentric), stop 3–4 reps from failure. NO overhead pressing, lateral raises, or dips. Nutrition 2800 kcal / 155g protein.
